add_chargers.title: Add Public Chargers
add_chargers.description: Drop a pin to search for nearby ChargePoint stations. Adjust the radius to widen or narrow the search.

select_chargers.title: Select chargers to track
select_chargers.description: Check the stations you want to monitor. Already-tracked stations are pre-checked.

remove_charger.title: Remove chargers
remove_charger.description: Check the chargers to remove. All associated entities will be removed from Home Assistant.

error.location_required: Please drop a pin on the map to set the search area.
error.no_stations_found: No ChargePoint stations were found in the selected area. Try a smaller radius or move the pin closer to the station. The map API clusters chargers into blobs at larger zoom levels, so increasing the radius may make this worse.
error.unknown_error: Failed to communicate with ChargePoint. Please check your connection and try again.

user.title: ChargePoint Credentials
user.description: Please enter your ChargePoint login credentials.

reauth_confirm.title: ChargePoint Reauthentication
reauth_confirm.description: Please provide your current ChargePoint account password.

captcha_token.title: Bot Protection Detected
captcha_token.description:
ChargePoint's bot protection (Datadome) blocked the password login. You can [resolve the challenge]({captcha_url}) in a browser and try again, or follow the steps below to provide a session token directly. This is more reliable and avoids the issue entirely.

**How to get your token:**
1. Open [{driver_url}]({driver_url}) in your browser and log in normally.
2. Open Developer Tools and navigate to **Application > Cookies > {driver_url}**.
3. Copy the value of the **`coulomb_sess`** cookie.
4. Paste it into the field below.

error.invalid_credentials: Invalid credentials, please verify you're using the right credentials and try again.
error.invalid_token: The token is invalid or expired. Please obtain a fresh `coulomb_sess` cookie value from driver.chargepoint.com and try again.
error.unknown_error: Unknown error communicating with ChargePoint. Please review the logs and create an issue.
